rationale: The citing paper uses Sethuraman et al. (2011) primarily as background support that prior research has focused on estimating advertising spending or GRP effects on sales, and as a general reference in its discussion of ad-spend endogeneity with weekly data. It does not directly build its core branding-cue framework, hypotheses, or estimation approach on that meta-analysis. There is no clear reuse or extension of the cited paper's specific findings beyond contextual positioning.
